description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a boxy, geometric design and a muted yellow upholstered finish. The seat and backrest are thickly padded, providing comfort and support, while the armrests are integrated into the main body, forming a continuous, angular silhouette. The chair sits atop a sturdy black metal base with five spokes, each ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The central support column is cylindrical and likely adjustable, though no adjustment levers are visible. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or stitching details. This chair is suitable for office, meeting, or reception areas in urban environments.
description: A boxy, yellow upholstered swivel chair with integrated armrests and a black five-spoke caster base. The design is modern, comfortable, and mobile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat, high backrest, and integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's angular profile and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned backrest and the full width of the chair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the continuous armrest and the sturdy base with casters.
attribute_central_support_column: A black cylindrical metal column, likely steel, connecting the seat to the five-spoke caster base; appears fixed with no visible telescoping or decorative features.
attribute_seat_back_design: Rectangular, high, and thickly padded backrest with a smooth yellow fabric finish and no visible patterns or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, boxy armrests made of the same yellow upholstered material as the seat, forming a continuous angular structure attached to the main body.
